positive: A stylized, whimsical celestial scene featuring a deep indigo night sky filled with glowing constellations, crescent moons, and soft nebula clouds. The central focus is a majestic, silhouetted mountain range forming the horizon line, overlaid with delicate, bioluminescent flora (glow-moss, crystal mushrooms). The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau mixed with modern vector illustration, emphasizing clean lines, high contrast, and deep saturation. Use gold foil accents and cosmic gradients. Perfect for a repeatable seamless print on clothing. Composition must be symmetrical, central, and visually balanced.
